name: Microservices Migration
description: Monolith decomposed into 5 microservices with diamond dependency graph, 6 agents, 15 tasks, daemon mode simulation

modules.name: user-service
modules.summary: User management microservice — registration, profiles, authentication

modules.name: order-service
modules.summary: Order processing microservice — cart, checkout, order history

modules.name: payment-service
modules.summary: Payment processing microservice — Stripe integration, invoicing, refunds

modules.name: notification-service
modules.summary: Notification microservice — email, SMS, push notifications

modules.name: api-gateway
modules.summary: API gateway — routing, rate limiting, auth token validation

agents.name: alice
agents.summary: Backend developer — owns user and order services

agents.name: bob
agents.summary: Payments specialist — owns payment service integration

agents.name: dave
agents.summary: Infrastructure engineer — owns infra, monitoring, deployments

agents.name: eve
agents.summary: QA engineer/reviewer — security audits, integration testing

tasks.name: arch-design
tasks.summary: Design microservice architecture: service boundaries, API contracts, data ownership

tasks.name: db-migration-plan
tasks.summary: Plan database decomposition: schema splits, data migration strategy, dual-write period

tasks.name: infra-setup
tasks.summary: Kubernetes cluster, service mesh, container registry, CI/CD pipelines

tasks.name: user-svc-impl
tasks.summary: Implement user service: gRPC API, PostgreSQL, user CRUD, profile management

tasks.name: order-svc-impl
tasks.summary: Implement order service: gRPC API, order lifecycle, inventory checks

tasks.name: payment-svc-impl
tasks.summary: Implement payment service: Stripe SDK, webhook handlers, idempotent charges

tasks.name: notification-svc-impl
tasks.summary: Implement notification service: email templates, SMS gateway, push via FCM

tasks.name: monitoring-setup
tasks.summary: Prometheus + Grafana dashboards, alerting rules, distributed tracing with Jaeger

tasks.name: api-gateway-impl
tasks.summary: Implement API gateway: route aggregation, auth middleware, rate limiting, circuit breakers

tasks.name: security-audit
tasks.summary: Security review: OWASP checklist, penetration testing, dependency audit, secrets management

tasks.name: integration-tests
tasks.summary: End-to-end test suite: service-to-service calls, failure scenarios, load testing

tasks.name: load-tests
tasks.summary: Performance testing: baseline metrics, stress testing, capacity planning

tasks.name: canary-deploy
tasks.summary: Canary deployment: 5% traffic split, monitoring, rollback criteria

tasks.name: full-deploy
tasks.summary: Full production deployment: traffic migration, monolith decommission plan

tasks.name: post-mortem-doc
tasks.summary: Migration post-mortem: lessons learned, performance comparisons, architecture decisions log

docs.name: service-contracts
docs.summary: gRPC proto definitions and REST API specs for all microservices

docs.name: migration-runbook
docs.summary: Step-by-step runbook for production cutover: pre-checks, rollback procedures, communication plan

plans.name: migration-plan
plans.summary: Microservices Migration — decompose monolith into 5 services across 15 tasks

cycles.title: Architecture and planning phase
cycles.scene: Frank leads architecture design while Alice plans the database decomposition and Dave sets up infrastructure.

cycles.title: Phase 1 completes, service implementation begins
cycles.scene: Architecture and DB plans are done. Three service implementations unblock simultaneously — the diamond dependency begins.

actions.body: Architecture finalized. Service boundaries: user-svc owns users+auth, order-svc owns orders+inventory, payment-svc owns charges+refunds. All communicate via gRPC. See service-contracts doc.
Payment service: use Stripe SDK with idempotency keys. Webhook signature verification required. See security-audit checklist.
DB migration plan ready. 3-phase approach: (1) dual-write to new schemas, (2) backfill historical data, (3) cut over reads. Zero-downtime target.

cycles.title: Reservation conflict on shared proto
cycles.scene: Bob reserves the shared proto file. Alice needs it too — conflict!

actions.body: BLOCKED: proto/shared.proto reserved by Bob. I need to add user service message types. Can we coordinate?
Bob will release proto/shared.proto after adding payment types. Coordinate directly — he should be done within the hour.

cycles.title: PCI compliance blocker on payments
cycles.scene: Bob discovers the payment service needs PCI DSS compliance review before proceeding.

actions.body: BLOCKED: Payment service requires PCI DSS Level 1 compliance. Need legal/compliance team sign-off on our Stripe integration approach. Cannot store card data even temporarily.
PCI compliance approved. Use Stripe Elements (client-side tokenization) — no card data touches our servers. Compliance team confirmed this qualifies as SAQ-A.

cycles.title: Services complete, converging on gateway
cycles.scene: All three services finish. The diamond converges — api-gateway-impl is now unblocked.

actions.body: Payment service complete. Stripe integration with idempotency keys, webhook verification, and refund handling. Ready for security audit.

cycles.title: Security audit findings and resolution
cycles.scene: Eve finds security issues during the audit that need fixing before integration tests.

actions.body: Security audit finding: payment webhook endpoint lacks rate limiting. An attacker could replay webhooks. Add signature timestamp validation (reject >5min old).
Security audit finding: user service password reset token has no expiry. Add 1-hour TTL.
Security audit complete. 2 findings (both medium severity, fixes in progress). No critical issues. OWASP top 10 checklist passed.

cycles.title: Integration testing and load testing
cycles.scene: Eve runs integration tests while Dave runs load tests in parallel.

actions.body: Integration tests: 147/150 passing. 3 failures in order-payment flow — race condition in webhook processing. Filing fix request.
Load test results: 2400 req/s sustained (target: 2000). P99 latency 120ms. Memory stable at 512MB per service. Ready for production.

cycles.title: Canary and full deployment
cycles.scene: The team deploys to production with a canary rollout strategy.

actions.body: Canary at 5% traffic for 2 hours. Error rate: 0.02% (baseline: 0.03%). Latency: -15% improvement. No anomalies. Recommending full rollout.
Migration complete. All services live. Monolith decommission scheduled for next sprint. Post-mortem doc in progress.

cycles.title: Graph exploration and export
cycles.scene: Explore the knowledge graph and export the full state.
